title: notelaea excelsa
intro: Notelaea excelsa, also known as the black acacia, is a flowering plant native to the coastal regions of eastern Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Notelaea excelsa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Notelaea excelsa may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
